title: Raccoon Removal in Hewlett, NY | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Hewlett, Long Island. Licensed experts serving Hewlett Harbor, Hewlett Bay Park & surrounding areas. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Raccoons in Hewlett's beautiful waterfront properties and established neighborhoods pose serious risks to homes and families. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Hewlett, from the Five Towns area to Hewlett Neck, protecting your property from damage and health hazards. Our humane removal process ensures raccoons are safely extracted and prevented from returning to your attic, chimney, or crawl space.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Hewlett and the Five Towns communities, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of Long Island wildlife management. Our licensed technicians provide thorough inspections, humane removal, complete exclusion services, and damage repair with transparent pricing from $900–$4,000 depending on the severity of your infestation.
localContext: Hewlett's mix of waterfront estates near Hewlett Harbor, classic colonials, and tree-lined residential streets creates ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in attics and chimneys. Properties near Hewlett Bay Park and the surrounding wetland areas are particularly vulnerable to raccoon intrusions, especially during nesting season when mothers seek safe denning sites.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Hewlett typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on factors like the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. A single raccoon in an accessible attic may cost around $900–$1,500, while a family of raccoons with babies requiring extensive repairs and exclusion can reach $3,000–$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Hewlett neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Hewlett due to the area's proximity to Hewlett Bay, abundant trees, and older homes with accessible entry points. The waterfront areas near Hewlett Harbor and properties backing onto wooded areas are especially prone to raccoon activity. These intelligent animals are attracted to garbage, pet food, and the safe shelter that attics and chimneys provide.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Hewlett home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Hewlett residents and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline depends on the situation—a single raccoon can often be removed in 1–2 days, while a mother with babies may require 2–3 weeks to ensure all animals are safely removed and relocated according to New York wildlife laws.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete restoration services including insulation replacement, structural repairs, sanitization, and exclusion work to prevent future raccoon entry. Raccoons can cause significant damage to attics, soffits, vents, and roofing in Hewlett's older homes. Our team will assess all damage during the inspection and include necessary repairs in your customized quote.
